title: Handpumps bring water to rural African communities, but many are broken – study models how best to maintain them
summary_en: A team of operations management researchers look at how nongovernmental organisations (NGOs) manage and maintain rural water systems.
title_cn: 《手动水泵为非洲农村社区供水 但大量水泵故障——研究构建最优维护模型》

title: New Executive in Residence program bridges classroom and boardroom
summary_en: Notre Dame MBA Executives in Residence bring extensive leadership experience to mentor MBA students, partner with faculty and expand professional networks beyond campus.
title_cn: 新设驻校高管项目衔接课堂教学与企业管理实务
